attribution_configurations.name: Last Click — 30-Day Click
attribution_configurations.description: 100% of conversion credit goes to the last clicked ad. 30-day click window. No view-through attribution.
attribution_configurations.notes: Default model used by Google Ads and Meta natively. Over-credits lower-funnel touchpoints and search branded. Undervalues prospecting.

attribution_configurations.name: Data-Driven — 7-Day Click / 1-Day View
attribution_configurations.description: Machine learning distributes credit across all touchpoints based on incremental contribution. Requires minimum conversion volume (300+/month). 7-day click, 1-day view window.
use_cases: Primary optimization model for Performance team Google Ads campaigns
Full-funnel analysis when sufficient data volume exists
attribution_configurations.notes: Preferred model for Google Ads when volume qualifies. Re-evaluate quarterly — model recalibrates as conversion patterns shift.

attribution_configurations.name: Linear — 30-Day Click / 7-Day View
attribution_configurations.description: Equal credit to all touchpoints in the conversion path. Cross-device and view-through enabled. Used for cross-channel path analysis.
use_cases: Cross-channel mix analysis and budget allocation decisions
Executive reporting when board wants full-path visibility
attribution_configurations.notes: Not used for bid optimization — informational only. Compare vs. last-click to quantify how much value upper-funnel is contributing.

attribution_configurations.name: Position-Based (U-Shape) — 30-Day Click
attribution_configurations.description: 40% credit to first and last touchpoints, 20% distributed equally across middle touchpoints. Emphasizes acquisition and closing touches.
use_cases: Validating that both brand discovery and closing campaigns are contributing

attribution_configurations.name: Meta Standard — 7-Day Click / 1-Day View
attribution_configurations.description: Meta's default attribution window. Last-click within 7-day click or 1-day view. Used for Meta Ads Manager reporting.
use_cases: Comparing Meta self-reported vs. GA4 attribution
attribution_configurations.notes: Meta self-reported figures will differ from GA4 due to iOS privacy changes (SKAdNetwork) and view-through counting. Expect 15-30% variance vs. GA4 last-click.
